text: The clean lines and muted tones of the first space create a calm, almost meditative atmosphere. The beanbags and soft lighting invite introspection; I feel at peace yet slightly detached, as if in waiting. Stepping into the second scene, I am struck by the vibrancy of color and the intellectual energy of the R+D exhibit. There is an air of promise, of innovation and thoughtful curiosity—a welcome reminder of humanity’s continual push for understanding and improvement. Here, I feel quietly inspired and eager to explore new ideas.
